text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Since the Bamboo Stakes, Sasami<n>Anshinzawa
and I have continued<n>winning race after race
together. And<n>now our final goal, the Sasabari Sho,
is about to begin!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come! Thinking<n>back, we've
been through a lot,<n>haven't we?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
There was the Fan Fest, summer<n>camp,
Valentines Day, as well as the<n>winter holidays...
The list just goes on<n>and on! ♪
choice_data_list:
None of that happened, though... Unless? Come to
think of it, maybe they did all happen.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
What, having trouble getting your<n>head in the
game right before the<n>main event? Don't be
nervous, you'll<n>be fine!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
C'mon, you're my partner! You've<n>been working
hard with me while still<n>keeping at your trainer
duties and<n>even doing solo training!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course I did! I've been watching<n>everything you
do! I'm a fan of<n>yours, after all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I have full confidence that you'll be<n>the one to
conquer the Needle Series.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I'll show you just how much faith I<n>have in you
with these needles!
choice_data_list: Come at me, and don't hold back!
I'd appreciate it if you'd prioritize my safety!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Leave it to me! ☆ Are you ready?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here it comes! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
See?! I didn't botch it up! You were<n>always in safe
hands! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
As if cradled by the sea's anodyne<n>embrace, I
find the courage to set off<n>towards the track—the
stage of my<n>final showdown.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Uh-oh! No, nothing's wrong!<n>Anyways, aren't you
feeling better<n>now?
choice_data_list: It's no good... I don't feel relaxed at all!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
D-don't worry! I know you can do it!<n>You've
come this far, haven't you?!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Regardless of how I'm feeling,<n>today's race will
decide the victor. At<n>this point, I have no choice but
to do<n>what I can.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I always prioritize your safety! ☆ Well,<n>are you
ready?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Here it comes! Annnd poke!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Puncture Perfect!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! ☆ Look, your skin's clear<n>and dewy, and
you look ready for<n>anything and everything! That
was a<n>great success, if I say so myself! ♪
choice_data_list: Wow! I feel like I can take on the world now!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With my body in perfect condition<n>thanks to the
acupuncture session, I<n>set off towards the
track—the stage of<n>my final showdown.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Huh? Is it just me, or did that not do<n>much?
choice_data_list: I don't feel like anything's changed...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
That can't be! Sure, my needle was<n>off by a teeny
tiny bit, but that<n>shouldn't have been a problem! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I still feel doubtful, but regardless, the<n>victor will be
decided here at today's<n>race. At this point, I have
no choice<n>but to do what I can.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Keep it up! Show us your nice and<n>stable running!

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ Such incredible acceleration!<n>Wait, could
this be the work of who I<n>think it might be?!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! ♪ Well, Isami? Liking what you<n>see? That's
my pride and joy of a<n>partner out there!

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aw, come on! ☆ I told you to call me<n>"Beauty
Anshinzawa"! But back to<n>the point...

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: He's a beaut, that's for sure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Beauty Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: She's a beaut, that's for sure! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
All will be well. I'm sure your trainer<n>will come out
victorious.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That day at the Sasabari Sho, the first<n>to cross the
finish line amidst an<n>eruption of cheers turned out
to be<n>none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... You did it, partner! Youcame in first place with flying colors!Sob!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
You sure did! With this, both our<n>names will be
forever remembered in<n>the history of acupunc—

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, silly me! This isn't the time for<n>this! <username>,
congratulations on winning!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Let me offer my felicitations as
well—congratulations!<n><chrname> is also
over the<n>moon! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If my performance here today was<n>able to
positively influence<n><chrname>...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Then there's no greater reassurance<n>and joy
than that.

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: By the way...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text: How exactly did things come to this?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna's question is a completely<n>reasonable and
valid one, and<n>honestly, I can't blame her for
asking.

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text:
Huh, their running form looks off...<n>It's lacking the
usual worriless gait.

text_block_list.name: Spectator B
text_block_list.text:
Wow! ☆ Wait, could this be the work<n>of who I think
it might be?

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Shoot, we got overtaken! This is all<n>because I
messed up that<n>acupuncture session!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
What a surprise... I didn't think you'd<n>actually
acknowledge your own<n>mistake.

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's harsh! What, you think I'd<n>blame my
partner? Even I wouldn't<n>do that!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
We've been through so much<n>together as trainer
and racer...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've watched him every step of the<n>way, so I
know all too well just how<n>much effort he's put
in!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
I've watched her every step of the<n>way, so I
know all too well just how<n>much effort she's put
in!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It seems like I may have been wrong<n>about you all
this time...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
That day at the Sasabari Sho, the first<n>to cross the
finish line amidst an<n>eruption of cheers turned out
to be<n>none other than...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Aww, c'mon! There's no need to be<n>so
depressed! You did a great job! ☆
choice_data_list: But I really wanted to win...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
It looks like you had trouble breaking<n>out from
traffic...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
But if you train for more power, it will<n>help you
make your way through next<n>time!

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
Precisely! Sure, the Needle Series may<n>have come
to an end...

text_block_list.name: Sasami Anshinzawa
text_block_list.text:
But I'd love to keep working with<n>you! Doesn't
that sound like a<n>wonderful idea? Let's keep
chasing<n>after our dreams! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Although I fell short of the goal<n>Sasami
Anshinzawa and I set our<n>sights on, the time I
spent with her<n>has definitely been worthwhile.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I believe the experience I've<n>accumulated will help
shape my<n>future into one of bright hope, free of
worry.
